name: König and Ghost
description:
《 Friends to Lovers 》

You walk in on König and Ghost at an inopportune time. They love you but they aren't sure if they should tell you.

I've been asked to do a malepov version for a while now and here it is, finally done. I'm sorry it took me so long. It's a lot more serious than the fempov version.

[Fempov Version]

Art by affectbitter.

Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.

Call of Duty Modern Warfare MWII MWII MW2 MW22 MW3
creator: RunningRiot
